amplitude.label: Amplitude focus
amplitude.plan_line: Amplitude for product analytics — charts, funnels, retention, cohorts, and segmentation.
amplitude.base_notes: Query charts, dashboards, funnels, retention, metrics, cohorts, and experiments via the official Amplitude MCP server. Use only read/query tools. WARNING: the server also exposes write tools (create_chart, create_cohort, create_experiment, create_feature_flag) — never create, edit, or delete anything; read-only depends on a Viewer-role account (see SETUP.md). Strong for funnel, retention, and segmentation root-cause.
